title: INSURANCE ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: THE DALLES CLINIC INSURANCE ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance to patients and community members in navigating and enrolling in Oregon Medicaid and healthcare exchange plans. 1040 Webber Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 296-4610 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 296-4610 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Hood River and Wasco Counties Services: Navigator Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - LGBTQ2+ HEALTH CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SERVICES MUTUAL SUPPORT - SALUD DIABETES MANAGEMENT PROGRAM OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE DALLES CLINIC
